title: Have a main/master file upload area to then assign files to tasks
excerpt: I want to upload scans for a project and being able to keep like a master folder of the scans to be able to then assign those scans to the matching subtask. That way I can keep track of when each scan grouping is complet…

posts.author: KnoxMuseumofED (Danielle Annette Sherrell)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to upload scans for a project and being able to keep like a master folder of the scans to be able to then assign those scans to the matching subtask. That way I can keep track of when each scan grouping is completed. Upload in one place and then assign. That way all file notations and discussions can be kept together.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you for the request @KnoxMuseumofED !!

Welcome to the community by the way

Everyone: You can vote for this at the top of this screen
